items.title_en: Evolutionary trajectory of allele frequency p
items.title_zh: 等位基因频率 p 的演化轨迹
items.intro_en: Sampling, drift, selection, mutation, and diffusion all rewrite how p moves through time.
items.intro_zh: 从采样计数到随机漂变，再到选择、突变与扩散近似，追踪 p 的动力学身份。
items.backbone_en: sampling counts -> neutral drift -> deterministic forces -> continuous approximations
items.backbone_zh: 采样计数 -> 随机漂变 -> 确定性力量 -> 连续近似

steps.title: Formula 2.8
steps.transition_en: p first becomes a state variable in a frequency distribution, so sampling is a trackable probability process.
steps.transition_zh: 先把 p 写成频率分布的状态变量，随机采样成为可追踪的概率过程。

steps.title: Formula 2.12
steps.transition_en: Drift now asks not only about the next generation, but about fixation and loss times.
steps.transition_zh: 漂变不再只问下一代，而是追问 p 到达固定或丢失的时间尺度。

steps.title: Formula 2.14a
steps.transition_en: The variance recursion turns p's random walk into a finite-population diffusion scale.
steps.transition_zh: 方差递推把 p 的随机游走量化为有限群体中的扩散宽度。

steps.title: Formula 2.15
steps.transition_en: The expectation formula gives the neutral baseline against which directional forces are read.
steps.transition_zh: 期望公式给出中性漂变下 p 的守恒基线，方便识别偏离。

steps.title: Formula 5.6e
steps.transition_en: Selection gradients make p respond to fitness rather than drift alone.
steps.transition_zh: 加入选择梯度后，p 的变化由随机漂变转向适合度驱动。

steps.title: Formula 6.15b
steps.transition_en: The Price framework writes p as an explicit increment that can coevolve with allelic effects.
steps.transition_zh: Price 框架把 p 的更新写成显式增量，允许效应值同步变化。

items.title_zh: 近交系数与杂合度流失理论
items.intro_en: Follow identity by descent from finite-population recursion into effective size and population structure.
items.intro_zh: 从近交递推出发，连接有限群体、有效大小与群体分化统计量。
items.backbone_en: inbreeding recursion -> heterozygosity decay -> effective-size correction -> F-statistics
items.backbone_zh: 近交递推 -> 杂合度衰减 -> 有效大小修正 -> F 统计量

steps.title: Formula 2.3
steps.transition_en: The recursion expresses identity by descent as a finite-population accumulation process.
steps.transition_zh: 近交递推把同源同祖概率写成有限群体每代累积的过程。

steps.title: Formula 2.4a
steps.transition_en: Rewriting with 1-f turns inbreeding growth into heterozygosity loss.
steps.transition_zh: 改写为 1-f 后，近交增长直接转化为杂合度的指数式流失。

steps.title: Formula 2.5
steps.transition_en: Replacing N by Ne admits that real reproductive variance changes drift strength.
steps.transition_zh: 用 N_e 替代 N，模型承认真实群体的繁殖方差会改变漂变强度。

steps.title: Formula 3.1
steps.transition_en: F estimators convert theoretical inbreeding into an observable effective-size signal.
steps.transition_zh: 样本中的 F 估计量把理论近交转成可观测的有效大小信号。

steps.title: Formula 4.17a
steps.transition_en: FST extends identity logic to population structure and divergence.
steps.transition_zh: F_ST 把同源同祖思想推广到群体分化，衡量结构化漂变。

steps.title: Formula 9.9
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the f, F storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 f, F 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。

items.intro_en: Track how elapsed time becomes fixation time, generation time, and tree depth.
items.intro_zh: 把 t/T 从世代计数推进到固定时间、世代间隔与溯祖树深度。
items.backbone_en: fixation time -> conditional loss/fixation -> generation interval -> sweep time
items.backbone_zh: 固定时间 -> 条件等待时间 -> 世代间隔 -> 扫荡时间

steps.title: Formula 2.11a
steps.transition_en: Drift trajectories are compressed into mean absorption time.
steps.transition_zh: 先把漂变轨迹压缩成平均吸收时间，时间成为可估计对象。

steps.title: Formula 2.11b
steps.transition_en: Separating fixation and loss makes t conditional on the endpoint.
steps.transition_zh: 区分固定与丢失后，t 开始描述不同终点的条件等待。

steps.title: Formula 2.11d
steps.transition_en: The total mean time recombines endpoint-specific waiting times.
steps.transition_zh: 总平均时间把两类终点重新合并，形成完整吸收尺度。

steps.title: Formula 3.13
steps.transition_en: Generation time T extends time accounting to age-structured populations.
steps.transition_zh: 世代间隔 T 把时间从等长世代推广到年龄结构群体。

steps.title: Formula 3.14
steps.transition_en: Selective sweeps turn T into a retrospective window on allele origin.
steps.transition_zh: 选择扫荡把 T 变成回看等位基因来源的时间窗口。

steps.title: Formula 8.18c
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the t, T storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 t, T 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。

items.title_zh: 适合度表面与适应性景观
items.intro_en: Follow fitness from genotype weights into phenotype gradients and selection response.
items.intro_zh: 追踪适合度如何从基因型权重扩展为表型景观与选择响应。
items.backbone_en: relative fitness -> phenotype integration -> local gradient -> Price covariance
items.backbone_zh: 相对适合度 -> 表型积分 -> 局部梯度 -> Price 协方差

steps.title: Formula 5.8a
steps.transition_en: Relative fitness normalizes genotype differences into comparable selection strength.
steps.transition_zh: 相对适合度把基因型差异归一化为可比较的选择强度。

steps.title: Formula 5.17a
steps.transition_en: As a phenotype function, w depends on trait distributions rather than isolated weights.
steps.transition_zh: 把 w 写成表型函数后，选择开始依赖性状分布而非单点权重。

steps.title: Formula 5.18b
steps.transition_en: A Taylor expansion supplies the weak-selection bridge to allelic effects.
steps.transition_zh: 泰勒展开提供弱选择近似，把景观局部斜率接入等位基因效应。

steps.title: Formula 5.20c
steps.transition_en: Normal trait assumptions translate fitness gradients into mean and variance terms.
steps.transition_zh: 正态表型假设让适合度梯度转化为均值与方差的代数项。

steps.title: Formula 6.2b
steps.transition_en: Price's equation places w inside covariance to measure selection response.
steps.transition_zh: Price 方程把 w 放进协方差，直接衡量选择造成的平均变化。

steps.title: Formula 6.5a
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the w storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 w 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。

items.title_zh: 连锁不平衡与双基因座网络
items.intro_en: Follow D from gamete-frequency excess into decay, recombination, and selection at linked sites.
items.intro_zh: 从配子频率偏离出发，追踪 D 在重组、选择与连锁位点中的变化。
items.backbone_en: gamete excess -> recombination decay -> standardized LD -> linked selection
items.backbone_zh: 配子偏离 -> 重组衰减 -> 标准化 LD -> 连锁选择

steps.title: Formula 2.18
steps.transition_en: D first records non-independence in two-locus gamete frequencies.
steps.transition_zh: D 首先把双位点配子频率的非独立性写成一个代数量。

steps.title: Formula 2.19
steps.transition_en: Adding recombination gives LD a generational decay scale.
steps.transition_zh: 加入重组率后，D 的期望按世代衰减，连锁开始具有时间尺度。

steps.title: Formula 2.21
steps.transition_en: Variance separates random fluctuation from persistent linkage signal.
steps.transition_zh: 方差形式把 D 的随机波动与长期连锁信号区分开。

steps.title: Formula 2.22
steps.transition_en: r2 standardizes D across allele-frequency backgrounds.
steps.transition_zh: r² 标准化 D，使不同等位基因频率下的连锁强度可比较。

steps.title: Formula 5.13a
steps.transition_en: Selection recursions make D part of gamete updating under fitness differences.
steps.transition_zh: 选择递推让 D 参与配子更新，显示重组与适合度的博弈。

steps.title: Formula 7.43
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the D storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 D 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。

items.title_zh: 突变压力与突变-漂变平衡
items.intro_en: Follow mutation parameters from deterministic pressure into finite-population equilibrium models.
items.intro_zh: 追踪 μ/u 如何从突变压力进入有限群体的平衡与采样模型。
items.backbone_en: mutation pressure -> equilibrium variance -> fixation probability -> sampling spectrum
items.backbone_zh: 突变压力 -> 平衡方差 -> 固定概率 -> 采样谱

steps.title: Formula 2.23
steps.transition_en: Mutation rate enters heterozygosity recursion and counters drift loss.
steps.transition_zh: 突变率先进入杂合度递推，抵消纯漂变造成的变异流失。

steps.title: Formula 2.26b
steps.transition_en: Equilibrium variance combines mutational input with sampling noise.
steps.transition_zh: 平衡方差把突变输入与有限群体采样噪声合并。

steps.title: Formula 7.2
steps.transition_en: Forward and reverse mutation pull allele frequency in opposing directions.
steps.transition_zh: 正反突变模型让 p 的更新同时受两个突变方向牵引。

steps.title: Formula 7.9
steps.transition_en: Fixation probabilities connect new mutants to drift and selection outcomes.
steps.transition_zh: 固定概率公式把突变产生的新等位基因接入漂变与选择结局。

steps.title: Formula 8.22a
steps.transition_en: Sampling spectra combine mutation and Ne into estimable diversity parameters.
steps.transition_zh: 采样分布把 μ 与 N_e 合并为可由多态数据估计的参数。

steps.title: Formula 10.1a
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the \mu, u storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 \mu, u 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。

items.title_zh: 表型性状的演化与传导
items.intro_en: Follow z from phenotype distributions into transmission, response, and macro-evolutionary comparison.
items.intro_zh: 把表型 z 从分布、传递和响应推进到宏观演化比较。
items.backbone_en: trait density -> transmission value -> response decomposition -> comparative divergence
items.backbone_zh: 性状密度 -> 传递值 -> 响应分解 -> 比较分化

steps.title: Formula 5.20a
steps.transition_en: The trait density places z in a continuous distribution for selection gradients.
steps.transition_zh: 表型密度把 z 放入连续分布，为选择梯度提供积分对象。

steps.title: Formula 6.20a
steps.transition_en: Mean phenotype is split into transmissible value and deviation.
steps.transition_zh: 平均表型被拆成可传递成分与偏差，连接亲代表现和后代响应。

steps.title: Formula 6.24a
steps.transition_en: Covariance attributes response in z to fitness-related genetic components.
steps.transition_zh: 协方差形式把 z 的响应归因到适合度相关的遗传成分。

steps.title: Formula 13.12a
steps.transition_en: Individual models express z as genotype, environment, and residual terms.
steps.transition_zh: 个体层模型把 z 写成基因型、环境与误差的可估计和。

steps.title: Formula 15.11b
steps.transition_en: Time-series response turns z into a cross-generation comparison target.
steps.transition_zh: 时间序列响应把 z 的变化推向跨世代比较与趋势检验。

steps.title: Formula 18.2
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the z storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 z 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。

items.title_en: Additive genetic components and breeding value
items.title_zh: 加性遗传成分与育种值
items.intro_en: Follow G and A from genotypic effects into additive variance, breeding value, and prediction.
items.intro_zh: 追踪 G/A 如何从基因型效应走向加性方差、育种值与预测方程。
items.backbone_en: breeding value -> additive response -> variance decomposition -> prediction
items.backbone_zh: 育种值 -> 加性响应 -> 方差分解 -> 预测

steps.title: Formula 6.20a
steps.transition_en: Ai extracts the transmissible additive contribution from phenotype.
steps.transition_zh: A_i 把表型均值拆出可传递的加性贡献。

steps.title: Formula 6.24a
steps.transition_en: Response equations link Az to fitness-associated change.
steps.transition_zh: 响应方程把 A_z 与适合度相关联，形成选择可改变的遗传均值。

steps.title: Formula 11.5
steps.transition_en: Genotypic value G expands locus effects into whole-genotype contribution.
steps.transition_zh: 基因型值 G 把单个座位效应扩展为全基因型贡献。

steps.title: Formula 11.6a
steps.transition_en: Squared expectations move G into variance decomposition.
steps.transition_zh: 平方期望把 G 推入方差分解，定位加性与非加性来源。

steps.title: Formula 11.8
steps.transition_en: Matrix A brings relatedness into scalable breeding-value prediction.
steps.transition_zh: 矩阵形式把亲缘关系写入 A，使育种值预测可规模化。

steps.title: Formula 13.12a
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the G, A storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 G, A 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。

items.title_en: Effective population size as a scale calibrator
items.title_zh: 有效群体大小的尺度调校
items.intro_en: Follow Ne as it calibrates drift, inbreeding, sampling variance, and detectable divergence.
items.intro_zh: 追踪 N_e 如何校准漂变、近交、采样方差与可检测的分化尺度。
items.backbone_en: inbreeding size -> variance size -> estimator correction -> divergence bounds
items.backbone_zh: 近交有效大小 -> 方差有效大小 -> 估计修正 -> 分化界限

steps.title: Formula 3.1
steps.transition_en: Ne replaces census size to express drift through effective reproductive contribution.
steps.transition_zh: N_e 首先替代 N，说明漂变强度由有效繁殖贡献决定。

steps.title: Formula 3.3
steps.transition_en: Offspring variance makes effective size estimable from reproductive output.
steps.transition_zh: 繁殖方差公式把有效大小从概念变成可由后代数估计的量。

steps.title: Formula 3.5
steps.transition_en: Multi-generation recursion lets Ne scale long-term lineage sampling.
steps.transition_zh: 多代递推让 N_e 控制谱系抽样概率的长期尺度。

steps.title: Formula 4.17a
steps.transition_en: F estimators connect effective size to observed frequency change.
steps.transition_zh: 样本 F 估计量把有效大小连接到观测到的频率变化。

steps.title: Formula 7.8
steps.transition_en: Drift variance turns Ne into the scale of allele-frequency fluctuation.
steps.transition_zh: 漂变方差公式把 N_e 变成等位基因频率波动的标尺。

steps.title: Formula 12.18b
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the N_e storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 N_e 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。

items.title_zh: 多性状关联与表型相关性
items.intro_en: Follow covariance and r as association becomes resemblance, response, and structured uncertainty.
items.intro_zh: 从协方差和相关系数出发，追踪性状关联、亲缘相似与联动响应。
items.backbone_en: standardized LD -> correlation estimator -> genetic covariance -> response coupling
items.backbone_zh: 标准化连锁 -> 相关估计 -> 遗传协方差 -> 响应联动

steps.title: Formula 2.22
steps.transition_en: r2 standardizes D into a comparable correlation scale.
steps.transition_zh: r² 将 D 标准化，把连锁强度变成可比较的相关尺度。

steps.title: Formula 2.29a
steps.transition_en: Expectation formulas show how recombination and mutation reduce association.
steps.transition_zh: 期望公式说明相关强度如何受重组与突变共同压低。

steps.title: Formula 4.14
steps.transition_en: Estimators turn observed correlation back into recombination scale.
steps.transition_zh: 估计式把观测相关反推为重组尺度，连接统计量与生物过程。

steps.title: Formula 7.23
steps.transition_en: Genetic covariance writes coupled breeding values as a response slope.
steps.transition_zh: 遗传协方差把两个育种值的联动写成选择响应的斜率。

steps.title: Formula 8.8e
steps.transition_en: Variance matrices generalize association to structured multi-trait uncertainty.
steps.transition_zh: 方差矩阵把相关性推广到多性状不确定性的整体结构。

steps.title: Formula 10.3b
steps.transition_en: The next step adds a new model constraint to the Cov, r storyline.
steps.transition_zh: 下一步为 Cov, r 加入新的模型限制，使主线进入更具体的问题。
